[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11111111 a
1 11111000 5
2 00001111 4
3 11010111 6
4 10111010 5
5 11111100 6
6 01010000 2
7 01111101 6

01 00111000 3
12 00000111 3
23 11100000 3
34 00001000 1
45 01000101 3
56 00000010 1
67 10101100 4
70 00000000 a

02 00010101 3
13 11000000 2
24 00101000 2
35 00000101 2
46 00000011 2
57 10101010 4
60 10000000 1
71 00010000 1

03 01110000 3
14 00000000 a
25 01000000 1
36 00000011 2
47 10000111 4
50 10000010 2
61 00111000 3
72 00010000 1

04 00101000 2
15 01000101 3
26 00000000 a
37 00001111 4 match 2
40 10000010 2
51 00111000 3
62 00010100 2
73 01010000 2 match 6

05 01000101 3
16 00000011 2
27 10101000 3
30 00000010 1
41 00010000 1
52 00010010 2
63 11110000 4
74 00000000 a

75 01000000 1

65 01000100 2
76 00000000 a
